requirement_topic.en: Hazardous-Substance Restriction — No Horizontal RoHS Regime in Angola
requirement_topic.zh: 有害物质限制——安哥拉无横向 RoHS 制度
requirement_topic.zht: 有害物質限制——安哥拉無橫向 RoHS 制度

summary.en: Angola does not, as of 2026, operate an EU-style horizontal RoHS regime that restricts the 10 hazardous substances in homogeneous materials of electrical and electronic equipment as a condition of market placement. There is no direct Angolan equivalent of Directive 2011/65/EU (RoHS 2) or the four-phthalate amendment (EU) 2015/863 that gates LED luminaire market entry on substance limits. This means a Chinese LED luminaire is generally not required to demonstrate full EU-style RoHS conformity (including the 4 phthalates) to enter the Angolan market on substance-restriction grounds alone. Caveats: (1) general product-safety, chemical, and environmental obligations under Angolan law may still apply to specific substances (e.g. mercury, given Angola's participation in international environmental frameworks); (2) modern LED luminaires are typically mercury-free and low-lead by design, so this is rarely a practical barrier; (3) importers, retailers, or downstream customers may contractually require RoHS-type declarations even absent a legal mandate. Treat substance restriction as commercially/contractually driven in Angola rather than a horizontal legal gate, and verify any product-specific chemical rules with the importer.
summary.zh: 截至 2026 年，安哥拉不实施欧盟式的、以电气电子设备均质材料中 10 项有害物质限制作为市场投放条件的横向 RoHS 制度。不存在直接对应指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）或四项邻苯二甲酸酯修订（EU）2015/863 的、以物质限值作为 LED 灯具市场准入门槛的安哥拉规定。这意味着中国 LED 灯具一般无需仅基于物质限制理由、为进入安哥拉市场而证明完整的欧盟式 RoHS 合规（含 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯）。注意事项：（1）安哥拉法律下的一般产品安全、化学品及环境义务仍可能适用于特定物质（如汞，鉴于安哥拉参与国际环境框架）；（2）现代 LED 灯具通常设计为无汞、低铅，故这鲜少构成实际障碍；（3）即便无法律强制，进口商、零售商或下游客户仍可能在合同上要求 RoHS 类声明。在安哥拉宜将物质限制视为商业/合同驱动，而非横向法律门槛，并与进口商核验任何产品特定的化学品规则。
summary.zht: 截至 2026 年，安哥拉不實施歐盟式的、以電氣電子設備均質材料中 10 項有害物質限制作為市場投放條件的橫向 RoHS 制度。不存在直接對應指令 2011/65/EU（RoHS 2）或四項鄰苯二甲酸酯修訂（EU）2015/863 的、以物質限值作為 LED 燈具市場准入門檻的安哥拉規定。這意味著中國 LED 燈具一般無需僅基於物質限制理由、為進入安哥拉市場而證明完整的歐盟式 RoHS 合規（含 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯）。注意事項：（1）安哥拉法律下的一般產品安全、化學品及環境義務仍可能適用於特定物質（如汞，鑒於安哥拉參與國際環境框架）；（2）現代 LED 燈具通常設計為無汞、低鉛，故這鮮少構成實際障礙；（3）即便無法律強制，進口商、零售商或下游客戶仍可能在合同上要求 RoHS 類聲明。在安哥拉宜將物質限制視為商業/合同驅動，而非橫向法律門檻，並與進口商核驗任何產品特定的化學品規則。

standards_or_laws: No EU-style horizontal RoHS regulation in Angola as of 2026 (no direct equivalent of Directive 2011/65/EU or (EU) 2015/863)
General Angolan product-safety, chemical and environmental law may apply to specific substances on a case-by-case basis

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB/T 26572 (concentration limit requirements for restricted substances in EEE), covering the original 6 RoHS substances (Pb, Hg, Cd, Cr(VI), PBB, PBDE) at the same thresholds as EU RoHS. China RoHS 2 (Administrative Measures, with the SJ/T 11364 disclosure-label standard) requires an orange/green hazardous-substance disclosure label on EEE sold in China. As of 2026 the 4 EU phthalates (DEHP, BBP, DBP, DIBP) are not in the Chinese mandatory restricted list. China's model is disclosure-and-limit-based for the original 6 substances; Angola has no equivalent horizontal restriction at all.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB/T 26572（电子电气产品中限用物质的限量要求），涵盖原 6 项 RoHS 物质（铅、汞、镉、六价铬、PBB、PBDE），限值与欧盟 RoHS 相同。中国 RoHS 2（管理办法，配套 SJ/T 11364 披露标识标准）要求在中国销售的 EEE 上贴附橙/绿色有害物质披露标识。截至 2026 年，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在中国强制限制清单中。中国对原 6 项物质采用披露加限值模型；安哥拉则完全没有等效的横向限制。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB/T 26572（電子電氣產品中限用物質的限量要求），涵蓋原 6 項 RoHS 物質（鉛、汞、鎘、六價鉻、PBB、PBDE），限值與歐盟 RoHS 相同。中國 RoHS 2（管理辦法，配套 SJ/T 11364 披露標識標準）要求在中國銷售的 EEE 上貼附橙/綠色有害物質披露標識。截至 2026 年，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯（DEHP、BBP、DBP、DIBP）不在中國強制限制清單中。中國對原 6 項物質採用披露加限值模型；安哥拉則完全沒有等效的橫向限制。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 26572 — Requirements for concentration limits for certain restricted substances in EEE (SAC/SAMR; original 6 substances)
SJ/T 11364-2014 — China RoHS 2 hazardous-substance disclosure label

gap.en: The honest position is that Angola imposes no horizontal RoHS gate, so a Chinese product is not at risk of being blocked on RoHS substance grounds the way it would be in the EU. Compared with China: China already restricts the original 6 substances and requires a disclosure label, so a CN-compliant LED luminaire is generally well within typical international substance expectations; Angola adds no further mandatory substance restriction. Practical points: (1) keep the existing China RoHS / GB/T 26572 evidence and disclosure data available, as importers or buyers may request it contractually; (2) the EU 4-phthalate issue is moot for Angola unless a specific buyer/contract requires it; (3) watch substance-specific environmental rules (notably mercury) under general Angolan law and international commitments. Do not over-engineer for an Angolan RoHS that does not exist — but do not assume zero chemical obligation either; verify product-specific rules with the importer.
gap.zh: 诚实的结论是，安哥拉不设横向 RoHS 门槛，因此中国产品不会像在欧盟那样面临因 RoHS 物质被阻断的风险。与中国相比：中国已限制原 6 项物质并要求披露标识，故符合中国标准的 LED 灯具一般已处于典型国际物质预期范围内；安哥拉未增加进一步的强制物质限制。务实要点：（1）保留现有的中国 RoHS/GB/T 26572 证据及披露数据，进口商或买方可能在合同上要求；（2）除非特定买方/合同要求，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯问题对安哥拉无实际意义；（3）关注安哥拉一般法律及国际承诺下的特定物质环境规则（尤其是汞）。不要为不存在的安哥拉 RoHS 过度设计——但也不要假设零化学品义务；请与进口商核验产品特定规则。
gap.zht: 誠實的結論是，安哥拉不設橫向 RoHS 門檻，因此中國產品不會像在歐盟那樣面臨因 RoHS 物質被阻斷的風險。與中國相比：中國已限制原 6 項物質並要求披露標識，故符合中國標準的 LED 燈具一般已處於典型國際物質預期範圍內；安哥拉未增加進一步的強制物質限制。務實要點：（1）保留現有的中國 RoHS/GB/T 26572 證據及披露數據，進口商或買方可能在合同上要求；（2）除非特定買方/合同要求，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯問題對安哥拉無實際意義；（3）關注安哥拉一般法律及國際承諾下的特定物質環境規則（尤其是汞）。不要為不存在的安哥拉 RoHS 過度設計——但也不要假設零化學品義務；請與進口商核驗產品特定規則。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal RoHS mandate as of 2026 — Angola has no EU-style 10-substance restriction gating market entry; substance declarations are typically commercial/contractual. Specific substances (e.g. mercury) may be touched by general environmental law
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (disclosure + limits for 6 substances) — China RoHS 2 disclosure label required; GB/T 26572 covers the original 6 substances; 4 EU phthalates not in the CN mandatory list as of 2026

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angola has no EU-style horizontal RoHS regime as of 2026, so a Chinese LED luminaire is not gated on the 10-substance restriction the way it would be for the EU — the EU 4-phthalate testing issue is generally moot for Angola unless a buyer/contract requires it. Keep the existing China RoHS / GB/T 26572 evidence available for contractual requests, and watch substance-specific environmental rules (notably mercury) under general Angolan law. Verify any product-specific chemical obligations with the importer rather than assuming either a full RoHS gate or zero obligation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 截至 2026 年，安哥拉没有欧盟式横向 RoHS 制度，因此中国 LED 灯具不会像面向欧盟那样受 10 项物质限制门槛约束——除非买方/合同要求，欧盟 4 项邻苯二甲酸酯检测问题对安哥拉一般无实际意义。请保留现有的中国 RoHS/GB/T 26572 证据以备合同请求，并关注安哥拉一般法律下的特定物质环境规则（尤其是汞）。请与进口商核验任何产品特定的化学品义务，而非假设存在完整 RoHS 门槛或零义务。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 截至 2026 年，安哥拉沒有歐盟式橫向 RoHS 制度，因此中國 LED 燈具不會像面向歐盟那樣受 10 項物質限制門檻約束——除非買方/合同要求，歐盟 4 項鄰苯二甲酸酯檢測問題對安哥拉一般無實際意義。請保留現有的中國 RoHS/GB/T 26572 證據以備合同請求，並關注安哥拉一般法律下的特定物質環境規則（尤其是汞）。請與進口商核驗任何產品特定的化學品義務，而非假設存在完整 RoHS 門檻或零義務。

requirement_topic.en: Chemical Supply-Chain Notification — No REACH-SVHC Equivalent in Angola
requirement_topic.zh: 化学品供应链通报——安哥拉无 REACH-SVHC 对应制度
requirement_topic.zht: 化學品供應鏈通報——安哥拉無 REACH-SVHC 對應制度

summary.en: Angola does not operate a REACH-style chemical regulation, and there is no Angolan equivalent of the REACH Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification duty or the ECHA Candidate List / SCIP database. A Chinese LED luminaire manufacturer is therefore generally not subject, for the Angolan market, to the ongoing obligation to screen the supply chain against a biannually updated SVHC candidate list, to notify B2B customers within 45 days, or to register articles in an SCIP-type database. This is a genuine absence of an EU-style horizontal obligation, not merely a weaker version of it. Caveats: (1) general Angolan chemical, environmental, and product-safety law may still address specific hazardous substances or hazardous-chemical labelling for chemicals as such (distinct from substances embedded in articles); (2) buyers, retailers, or supply-chain partners may contractually require SVHC or full-material declarations even though Angolan law does not; (3) where an exporter also serves EU customers, REACH obligations arise from the EU placement, not from Angola. Treat SVHC/REACH as not legally required for the Angolan market while keeping declarations available for contractual or multi-market needs.
summary.zh: 安哥拉不实施 REACH 式化学品法规，且不存在 REACH 第 33 条 SVHC 供应链通报义务或 ECHA 候选清单/SCIP 数据库的安哥拉对应物。因此，面向安哥拉市场，中国 LED 灯具制造商一般不承担以下持续义务：对照每半年更新的 SVHC 候选清单筛查供应链、在 45 天内通报 B2B 客户，或在 SCIP 类数据库中注册物品。这是欧盟式横向义务的真正缺失，而非其较弱版本。注意事项：（1）安哥拉一般化学品、环境及产品安全法仍可能针对特定有害物质或针对化学品本身（区别于嵌入物品中的物质）的危险化学品标签作出规定；（2）即便安哥拉法律未要求，买方、零售商或供应链伙伴仍可能在合同上要求 SVHC 或全材料声明；（3）当出口商同时服务欧盟客户时，REACH 义务源于欧盟投放，而非安哥拉。宜将 SVHC/REACH 视为安哥拉市场法律上非必需，同时保留声明以备合同或多市场需要。
summary.zht: 安哥拉不實施 REACH 式化學品法規，且不存在 REACH 第 33 條 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務或 ECHA 候選清單/SCIP 數據庫的安哥拉對應物。因此，面向安哥拉市場，中國 LED 燈具製造商一般不承擔以下持續義務：對照每半年更新的 SVHC 候選清單篩查供應鏈、在 45 天內通報 B2B 客戶，或在 SCIP 類數據庫中注冊物品。這是歐盟式橫向義務的真正缺失，而非其較弱版本。注意事項：（1）安哥拉一般化學品、環境及產品安全法仍可能針對特定有害物質或針對化學品本身（區別於嵌入物品中的物質）的危險化學品標籤作出規定；（2）即便安哥拉法律未要求，買方、零售商或供應鏈夥伴仍可能在合同上要求 SVHC 或全材料聲明；（3）當出口商同時服務歐盟客戶時，REACH 義務源於歐盟投放，而非安哥拉。宜將 SVHC/REACH 視為安哥拉市場法律上非必需，同時保留聲明以備合同或多市場需要。

standards_or_laws: No REACH-style chemical regulation or SVHC supply-chain notification duty in Angola as of 2026 (no equivalent of REACH Article 33, ECHA Candidate List, or SCIP database)
General Angolan chemical / environmental / hazardous-chemical labelling law may apply to chemicals as such, distinct from substances in articles

summary.en: China also has no direct equivalent of REACH Article 33 supply-chain notification for substances in articles. The closest Chinese instruments are MEE Order No. 12 (Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances) on new-substance registration, and GB 30981 (classification and labelling of chemicals) for hazardous chemicals as such — neither creates a proactive B2B SVHC-in-articles notification duty. So both China and Angola lack a REACH Article 33 analogue; the difference from the EU comparison is that REACH is an EU-side obligation that does not arise from either the Chinese or Angolan market.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有针对物品中物质的 REACH 第 33 条供应链通报的直接对应制度。最接近的中国工具为关于新物质登记的生态环境部令第 12 号（《新化学物质环境管理登记办法》）及针对化学品本身的 GB 30981（化学品分类和标签）——两者均未产生主动的 B2B 物品中 SVHC 通报义务。因此中国与安哥拉均缺乏 REACH 第 33 条的对应制度；与欧盟对照的差异在于，REACH 是欧盟侧义务，并非由中国或安哥拉市场产生。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有針對物品中物質的 REACH 第 33 條供應鏈通報的直接對應制度。最接近的中國工具為關於新物質登記的生態環境部令第 12 號（《新化學物質環境管理登記辦法》）及針對化學品本身的 GB 30981（化學品分類和標籤）——兩者均未產生主動的 B2B 物品中 SVHC 通報義務。因此中國與安哥拉均缺乏 REACH 第 33 條的對應制度；與歐盟對照的差異在於，REACH 是歐盟側義務，並非由中國或安哥拉市場產生。

standards_or_laws: MEE Order No. 12 — Measures for the Environmental Management of New Chemical Substances (China; new-substance registration)
GB 30981 — Rules for the classification and labelling of chemicals (China; chemicals as such)

gap.en: For the Angola-vs-China comparison, there is effectively no gap on REACH-type supply-chain notification because neither market imposes a REACH Article 33 analogue — the obligation is EU-specific. Practical implications: (1) a Chinese manufacturer selling into Angola does not need to set up biannual ECHA Candidate List screening, the 45-day B2B response process, or SCIP registration for the Angolan market; (2) however, if the same product is also placed on the EU market, the REACH obligation attaches to that EU placement and must be handled separately; (3) keep material/substance declaration capability available, because EU and other-market customers, or contractual terms, may demand it. The honest mapping is: REACH SVHC is not an Angolan requirement, so this row exists to document the absence and prevent over-compliance, while flagging that the obligation can still arise from parallel EU sales.
gap.zh: 就安哥拉与中国的对照而言，在 REACH 类供应链通报上实际上不存在差距，因为两个市场均未设 REACH 第 33 条的对应制度——该义务为欧盟特有。务实含义：（1）向安哥拉销售的中国制造商无需为安哥拉市场建立每半年 ECHA 候选清单筛查、45 天 B2B 回应流程或 SCIP 注册；（2）但若同一产品也投放欧盟市场，REACH 义务附属于该欧盟投放，须另行处理；（3）保留材料/物质声明能力，因为欧盟及其他市场客户或合同条款可能要求。诚实的映射为：REACH SVHC 不是安哥拉要求，故本行用于记录该缺失并防止过度合规，同时提示该义务仍可能由并行的欧盟销售产生。
gap.zht: 就安哥拉與中國的對照而言，在 REACH 類供應鏈通報上實際上不存在差距，因為兩個市場均未設 REACH 第 33 條的對應制度——該義務為歐盟特有。務實含義：（1）向安哥拉銷售的中國製造商無需為安哥拉市場建立每半年 ECHA 候選清單篩查、45 天 B2B 回應流程或 SCIP 注冊；（2）但若同一產品也投放歐盟市場，REACH 義務附屬於該歐盟投放，須另行處理；（3）保留材料/物質聲明能力，因為歐盟及其他市場客戶或合同條款可能要求。誠實的映射為：REACH SVHC 不是安哥拉要求，故本行用於記錄該缺失並防止過度合規，同時提示該義務仍可能由並行的歐盟銷售產生。

mandatory_status.target: No equivalent — Angola has no REACH-style SVHC supply-chain notification duty, ECHA Candidate List, or SCIP database as of 2026; not required for the Angolan market
mandatory_status.cn: No equivalent — China has no REACH Article 33 analogue for substances in articles; closest instruments address new-substance registration and chemicals as such

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Neither Angola nor China operates a REACH Article 33 SVHC supply-chain notification duty for substances in articles — this obligation is EU-specific. A Chinese manufacturer selling into Angola does not need ECHA Candidate List screening, 45-day B2B responses, or SCIP registration for the Angolan market. Keep material/substance declaration capability available for contractual or EU-market needs, since the REACH obligation can still arise from parallel EU sales rather than from Angola.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉与中国均不实施针对物品中物质的 REACH 第 33 条 SVHC 供应链通报义务——该义务为欧盟特有。向安哥拉销售的中国制造商无需为安哥拉市场进行 ECHA 候选清单筛查、45 天 B2B 回应或 SCIP 注册。请保留材料/物质声明能力以备合同或欧盟市场需要，因为 REACH 义务仍可能由并行的欧盟销售而非安哥拉产生。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉與中國均不實施針對物品中物質的 REACH 第 33 條 SVHC 供應鏈通報義務——該義務為歐盟特有。向安哥拉銷售的中國製造商無需為安哥拉市場進行 ECHA 候選清單篩查、45 天 B2B 回應或 SCIP 注冊。請保留材料/物質聲明能力以備合同或歐盟市場需要，因為 REACH 義務仍可能由並行的歐盟銷售而非安哥拉產生。

requirement_topic.en: Overall Market-Access Process — IANORQ Conformity + Import Inspection vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zh: 整体市场准入流程——IANORQ 合格评定 + 进口检验 vs CCC / CQC
requirement_topic.zht: 整體市場准入流程——IANORQ 合格評定 + 進口檢驗 vs CCC / CQC

summary.en: Placing an LED luminaire on the Angolan market is built around IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection rather than an EU-style multi-directive CE self-declaration. The practical package typically comprises: (1) IEC-based test evidence for electrical safety (NA/IEC 60598 / NA/IEC 62560) and lighting EMC (NA/CISPR 15), commonly via an IECEE CB Scheme report/certificate, plus photobiological evidence (NA/IEC 62471) where required; (2) INACOM radio type approval for any wireless functionality; (3) the national energy label where the energy-labelling programme applies; (4) Portuguese-language marking, instructions, warnings, and packaging; (5) a local in-country importer/representative who acts as the responsible party for clearance and placement, and through whom IANORQ documentation and import inspection are handled. Goods commonly enter via the ports of Luanda or Lobito and are subject to import inspection. There is no CE mark and no EU-style Authorised Representative; the Angolan importer is the responsible domestic entity.
summary.zh: 在安哥拉市场投放 LED 灯具围绕 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验展开，而非欧盟式多指令 CE 自我声明。务实材料包通常包括：（1）电气安全（NA/IEC 60598 / NA/IEC 62560）及照明 EMC（NA/CISPR 15）的基于 IEC 的检测证据，常以 IECEE CB 体系报告/证书提供，并在要求时附光生物证据（NA/IEC 62471）；（2）任何无线功能的 INACOM 无线电型号核准；（3）在能效标识计划适用时的国家能效标签；（4）葡萄牙语标志、说明书、警示及包装；（5）作为清关与投放责任方的在地进口商/代表，并通过其办理 IANORQ 文件及进口检验。货物通常经卢安达（Luanda）或洛比托（Lobito）港进入并接受进口检验。不存在 CE 标志，也无欧盟式授权代表；安哥拉进口商为责任境内主体。
summary.zht: 在安哥拉市場投放 LED 燈具圍繞 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗展開，而非歐盟式多指令 CE 自我聲明。務實材料包通常包括：（1）電氣安全（NA/IEC 60598 / NA/IEC 62560）及照明 EMC（NA/CISPR 15）的基於 IEC 的檢測證據，常以 IECEE CB 體系報告/證書提供，並在要求時附光生物證據（NA/IEC 62471）；（2）任何無線功能的 INACOM 無線電型號核准；（3）在能效標識計劃適用時的國家能效標籤；（4）葡萄牙語標誌、說明書、警示及包裝；（5）作為清關與投放責任方的在地進口商/代表，並通過其辦理 IANORQ 文件及進口檢驗。貨物通常經盧安達（Luanda）或洛比托（Lobito）港進入並接受進口檢驗。不存在 CE 標誌，也無歐盟式授權代表；安哥拉進口商為責任境內主體。

standards_or_laws: IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade) — built on adopted NA/IEC standards
INACOM radio type approval for wireless devices; Angolan national energy label where applicable; ports of Luanda / Lobito import inspection; in-country importer/representative requirement

summary.en: In China, the primary market-access route for in-scope luminaires is CCC (China Compulsory Certification), administered by CNCA with mandatory third-party certification by bodies such as CQC; CQC voluntary certification covers products outside mandatory CCC. Wireless-enabled luminaires additionally require SRRC type approval, and GB 30255 / China Energy Label applies to energy-rated products. The CCC mark, CEL, and China RoHS disclosure label are China-specific schemes. None of these transfer to Angola, which uses IANORQ conformity assessment, IEC-based evidence, INACOM radio approval, and Portuguese documentation through a local importer.
summary.zh: 在中国，范围内灯具的主要市场准入路径为中国强制性产品认证（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，须经 CQC 等机构进行强制性第三方认证；CQC 自愿认证覆盖强制 CCC 之外的产品。无线功能灯具还须 SRRC 型号核准，能效产品适用 GB 30255/中国能效标识。CCC 标志、CEL 及中国 RoHS 披露标识为中国特有方案。上述均不能转用于安哥拉——安哥拉通过在地进口商使用 IANORQ 合格评定、基于 IEC 的证据、INACOM 无线电核准及葡萄牙语文件。
summary.zht: 在中國，範圍內燈具的主要市場准入路徑為中國強制性產品認證（CCC），由 CNCA 管理，須經 CQC 等機構進行強制性第三方認證；CQC 自願認證覆蓋強制 CCC 之外的產品。無線功能燈具還須 SRRC 型號核准，能效產品適用 GB 30255/中國能效標識。CCC 標誌、CEL 及中國 RoHS 披露標識為中國特有方案。上述均不能轉用於安哥拉——安哥拉通過在地進口商使用 IANORQ 合格評定、基於 IEC 的證據、INACOM 無線電核准及葡萄牙語文件。

standards_or_laws: CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — CNCA/CQC mandatory third-party route for in-scope luminaires
SRRC type approval (wireless); GB 30255 / China Energy Label; China RoHS disclosure label — all China-specific, non-transferable to Angola

gap.en: CCC and the Angolan IANORQ route are parallel, non-mutual processes: a Chinese CCC certificate does not satisfy Angolan market access, and separate Angolan documentation is required. Key differences and an exporter checklist: (1) evidence basis — Angola prefers IEC-based reports (IECEE CB to IEC 60598/62560/CISPR 15/62471) rather than CCC certificates, so building to and testing under the IEC series eases entry; (2) responsible party — Angola requires a local in-country importer/representative (not an EU-style Authorised Representative and not the Chinese manufacturer alone); (3) radio — wireless products need INACOM approval, separate from China's SRRC; (4) energy label — the Angolan national label is separate from the Chinese CEL; (5) language — Portuguese documentation and markings; (6) logistics — import inspection at Luanda/Lobito. Because Angolan conformity practice can vary and policy is developing, confirm the exact document set, required marks, and any product-category specifics with IANORQ / the importer before shipment.
gap.zh: CCC 与安哥拉 IANORQ 路径为并行、不互认的流程：中国 CCC 证书不满足安哥拉市场准入，须另行准备安哥拉文件。主要差异及出口商清单：（1）证据基础——安哥拉倾向基于 IEC 的报告（对齐 IEC 60598/62560/CISPR 15/62471 的 IECEE CB），而非 CCC 证书，故按 IEC 系列设计并检测有利于准入；（2）责任方——安哥拉要求在地进口商/代表（既非欧盟式授权代表，也非仅中国制造商）；（3）无线电——无线产品须 INACOM 核准，区别于中国 SRRC；（4）能效标签——安哥拉国家标签独立于中国 CEL；（5）语言——葡萄牙语文件与标志；（6）物流——卢安达/洛比托港进口检验。由于安哥拉合格评定做法可能不一且政策仍在发展，出货前请与 IANORQ/进口商确认确切文件集、所需标志及任何产品类别细节。
gap.zht: CCC 與安哥拉 IANORQ 路徑為並行、不互認的流程：中國 CCC 證書不滿足安哥拉市場准入，須另行準備安哥拉文件。主要差異及出口商清單：（1）證據基礎——安哥拉傾向基於 IEC 的報告（對齊 IEC 60598/62560/CISPR 15/62471 的 IECEE CB），而非 CCC 證書，故按 IEC 系列設計並檢測有利於准入；（2）責任方——安哥拉要求在地進口商/代表（既非歐盟式授權代表，也非僅中國製造商）；（3）無線電——無線產品須 INACOM 核准，區別於中國 SRRC；（4）能效標籤——安哥拉國家標籤獨立於中國 CEL；（5）語言——葡萄牙語文件與標誌；（6）物流——盧安達/洛比托港進口檢驗。由於安哥拉合格評定做法可能不一且政策仍在發展，出貨前請與 IANORQ/進口商確認確切文件集、所需標誌及任何產品類別細節。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (process) — IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection, supported by IEC-based test evidence, Portuguese documentation, and an in-country importer/representative; INACOM approval for wireless and national energy label where applicable
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — CCC for in-scope luminaires under CNCA; SRRC for wireless; GB 30255 / China Energy Label for energy-rated products — all China-specific and non-transferable

source.publisher: ISO member directory — IANORQ (Instituto Angolano de Normalizacao e Qualidade), Angola

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Angolan market access for LED luminaires runs through IANORQ conformity assessment and import inspection, not an EU-style CE self-declaration and not the Chinese CCC. The practical package is IEC-based test evidence (IECEE CB to IEC 60598/62560/CISPR 15/62471), INACOM approval for wireless, the national energy label where applicable, Portuguese documentation, and a local in-country importer/representative as the responsible party, with import inspection at Luanda/Lobito. A Chinese CCC certificate does not transfer. Confirm the exact document set, required marks, and product-category specifics with IANORQ / the importer before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 安哥拉 LED 灯具市场准入通过 IANORQ 合格评定及进口检验，而非欧盟式 CE 自我声明，也非中国 CCC。务实材料包为基于 IEC 的检测证据（对齐 IEC 60598/62560/CISPR 15/62471 的 IECEE CB）、无线产品的 INACOM 核准、适用时的国家能效标签、葡萄牙语文件，以及作为责任方的在地进口商/代表，并在卢安达/洛比托港进行进口检验。中国 CCC 证书不能转用。出货前请与 IANORQ/进口商确认确切文件集、所需标志及产品类别细节。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 安哥拉 LED 燈具市場准入通過 IANORQ 合格評定及進口檢驗，而非歐盟式 CE 自我聲明，也非中國 CCC。務實材料包為基於 IEC 的檢測證據（對齊 IEC 60598/62560/CISPR 15/62471 的 IECEE CB）、無線產品的 INACOM 核准、適用時的國家能效標籤、葡萄牙語文件，以及作為責任方的在地進口商/代表，並在盧安達/洛比托港進行進口檢驗。中國 CCC 證書不能轉用。出貨前請與 IANORQ/進口商確認確切文件集、所需標誌及產品類別細節。
